titleZh: 开启 Java 开发之路
descEn: Entered the property SaaS industry, learning enterprise-level system architecture from scratch. Grew into a full-stack engineer capable of independently delivering core modules.
descZh: 进入物业 SaaS 行业，从零开始学习企业级系统架构与业务领域知识，逐步成长为能够独立承担核心模块开发的全栈工程师。
highlightsEn: Independently developed tenant on/offboarding module for SaaS platform
Built parking coupon module with cross-platform data sync
Completed elevator control module for owner APP (full-stack)
Led most business features for Zhongtian Mall
Independently developed activity booking platform
Integrated ICBC payment API
Long-term production system maintenance and issue resolution
highlightsZh: 独立完成物业 SaaS 平台租户迁入迁出模块开发
独立完成停车优惠券模块，实现跨平台数据互通
完成业主 APP 梯控功能前后端开发
负责中天商城大部分业务功能开发
独立开发活动预约平台，完成商城业务改造
参与工行支付接口联调
长期负责线上系统维护与问题排查

descEn: Led the activity booking platform from 0 to 1, independently delivering the full business workflow. Also responsible for daily development and maintenance of the Rainbow Card platform.
descZh: 主导活动预约平台的从 0 到 1 搭建，独立完成核心业务全流程开发，同时负责中铁彩虹一卡通平台的日常开发与系统维护。
highlightsEn: Built full booking workflow (SKU, orders, categories, user management)
Developed Banner and homepage frontend pages
Refactored mall frontend for better UX
Maintained Rainbow Card platform and resolved production bugs
highlightsZh: 独立完成预约业务全流程开发（SKU、订单、分类、用户管理）
完成 Banner、首页等前端页面开发
重构商城前端样式，提升用户体验
负责中铁彩虹一卡通平台日常开发与 Bug 修复

titleZh: 晋升 IT 技术负责人
descEn: Promoted to technical supervisor, leading smart parking implementation, comprehensive platform development, and enterprise digital transformation. Coordinating system deployment, vendor relations, and team management.
descZh: 晋升为技术主管，负责智慧停车项目实施、综合平台开发及企业数字化平台建设，统筹系统部署、供应商协调及团队管理。
highlightsEn: Led smart parking project implementation and on-site support
Developed Rainbow comprehensive platform and Rainbow system
Managed server deployment, Linux config, and system launch
Coordinated vendor API integration and project delivery
Production bug investigation, log analysis, and system stability
highlightsZh: 负责智慧停车项目实施及现场技术支持
负责彩虹综合平台及 Rainbow 系统开发与维护
负责服务器部署、Linux 环境配置及系统上线
协调供应商进行接口联调及项目实施
负责线上 Bug 排查、日志分析及系统稳定性维护

descEn: Started the AI journey: learned Ollama, independently deployed Deepseek locally, attended the first Modifangzhou Guizhou AI Developer Conference, and gained comprehensive understanding of domestic AI models and chat tools.
descZh: 正式踏入 AI 领域：学习 Ollama 使用，独立完成 Deepseek 本地部署，参与模力方舟贵州首届 AI 开发者大会，全面了解国内各家 AI 模型与聊天工具。
highlightsEn: Learned Ollama and independently deployed Deepseek locally
Attended Modifangzhou Guizhou First AI Developer Conference
Familiar with major domestic AI chat software and platforms
Gained comprehensive understanding of domestic AI models
highlightsZh: 学习 Ollama 使用，独立完成 Deepseek 本地部署
参与模力方舟贵州首届 AI 开发者大会
熟悉国内各大 AI 聊天软件与平台
全面了解国内各家 AI 模型

descEn: Transitioning from traditional software to AI-native applications. Deep diving into LLMs, RAG, and Agents. Building practical AI tools and documenting everything.
descZh: 从传统软件开发转向 AI 原生应用，深入学习大语言模型、RAG、Agent 等技术，搭建本地知识库系统，探索 AI 辅助开发的最佳实践。
highlightsEn: Built local knowledge base with Dify, Ollama, Qwen, RAG
Familiar with Embedding, vector retrieval, BM25, HyDE, Rerank, Query Rewrite
Practicing AI-assisted development (Vibe Coding)
Proficient with ChatGPT, Mimo Code, Gemini, Codex tools
Strong Prompt Engineering skills for rapid prototyping and PoC
highlightsZh: 完成基于 Dify、Ollama、Qwen、RAG 的本地知识库系统搭建
熟悉 Embedding、向量检索、BM25、HyDE、Rerank、Query Rewrite
具备 AI 辅助开发（Vibe Coding）实践能力
熟练运用 ChatGPT、Mimo Code、Gemini、Codex 等 AI 工具
具备 Prompt Engineering 能力，可设计高质量 Prompt
